title: Spectrum Study Compiler Artifact Bundle
description: Schema for SYS-004 compiled artifact bundles with deterministic ordering and provenance links.

schema_version.description: Version of the artifact bundle schema.

manifest_ref.description: Compiler manifest that produced this bundle.

source_revision.description: Upstream document or artifact revision compiled.

resolved_revision.description: Revision resolved after validation and linkage.

section_order.description: Explicit order of sections or anchors used during assembly.

artifact_order.description: Final deterministic ordering of artifacts emitted.

artifacts.description: Artifacts included in the compiled bundle.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact in the bundle.

section_id.description: Section anchor the artifact is assembled into.

ordering_key.description: Deterministic key used to order within the section.

assumption_links.description: Assumption IDs required by the artifact; may be empty when optional.

precedent_links.description: Precedent or reference IDs linked to the artifact.

provenance_ref.description: Provenance record ID for the artifact.

checksum_placeholder.description: Checksum placeholder for the compiled artifact rendering.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings associated with the artifact.

errors.description: Blocking errors associated with the artifact.
Bundle-level blocking errors that must be cleared before release.

bundle_checksum.description: Checksum placeholder for the full bundle payload.

diagnostics_checksum.description: Checksum placeholder for the diagnostics emitted with the bundle.

hash_placeholders.description: Checksum placeholders to be populated by downstream implementation.

compiled_at.description: Timestamp when the bundle was compiled (UTC).
